lyrics_lrc:
[00:00.06]Drum on the tray, drum on the tray!
[00:03.90]Louie's got the beat for the cay today!
[00:07.82]Boom-boom-clap, give it your best!
[00:11.78]Everybody join in, give it a rest!
[00:15.54]Drum on the tray, drum on the tray!
[00:19.46]Louie's got the beat for the cay today!
[00:24.60]Bang the drums, sing the song,
[00:29.04]Lunchtime jamming all day long!
[00:32.64]Drum on the tray, drum on the tray!
[00:34.74]Louie's got the beat for the cay today!
